overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V showing a night drive through a distorted, glitch-effect urban landscape in Los Santos. The camera moves steadily forward past a CVS pharmacy and through a rock-lined corridor toward the illuminated Maze Bank tower, with the MGM Grand sign visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with pharmacy and distorted rock formations

events.description: black SUV passes by on the right side of the road
white car drives ahead in the same direction

agents.ego_description: driving forward through a distorted urban commercial area at night, passing a CVS pharmacy

notable_agents.action: black SUV passing by on the right side
white car driving ahead on the road

entered.detail: commercial building with red and white CVS signage, distorted texture
tall dark building with illuminated windows and signage
tall illuminated art deco skyscraper with yellow lighting
large distorted rock structure with fabric-like texture covering
large distorted rock structure on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a city street at night with a CVS pharmacy on the right and the Maze Bank tower visible in the distance. The camera drives forward through a narrow corridor lined with distorted rock formations. A black SUV passes on the right, followed by a white car ahead, as the camera moves past the commercial buildings.

events.description: MGM Grand casino sign becomes visible on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow rock corridor toward the illuminated Maze Bank tower

entered.detail: illuminated green and yellow casino signage on building rooftop

segments.scene_description: The camera drives deeper into the rock-lined corridor, leaving the CVS and office tower behind. The Maze Bank tower grows larger in the center of the frame. Around the 25-second mark, the illuminated MGM Grand sign becomes visible on the left, adding to the casino district atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching Maze Bank tower with casino district signage

agents.ego_description: approaching the base of the Maze Bank tower with the MGM sign now prominent on the left

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera continuing forward as the Maze Bank tower looms larger in the center. The MGM Grand sign is now prominent on the left. The rock formations on the left recede into the distance while the right-side rocks remain close to the camera path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive through a glitching urban landscape that shifts from a commercial city street into a surreal, rock-lined corridor. It begins on a night street passing a CVS pharmacy with the Maze Bank tower visible in the distance, moving past a black SUV and a white car. As the camera drives deeper into the narrow passage, the commercial buildings recede and the distorted rock formations begin to flank the path, while the distant tower grows larger in the center of the frame. The scene then expands to reveal the illuminated MGM Grand sign on the left, enhancing the casino district atmosphere. Finally, the camera continues its steady approach as the Maze Bank tower looms overhead and the rock formations on the left drift away, leaving the right-side rocks close to the path.
